name: Code Division Modulation Layers Against Forgetting and Inference in Continual Gait Identification

description: arXiv:2607.19122v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Continual learning (CL) has been recently employed in biometric identification systems thanks to its ability to integrate new knowledge within a pre-trained model and to the possibility of reducing the computational cost of training. Unfortunately, such approaches pose new challenges both in terms of final accuracy and privacy guarantees since a...
author: Simone Milani
